title: The Cat And The Fox
content:
The Fox said "I can play, when it fits,
    Many wiles that with man make me quits."
    "But my trick's up a tree!"
    Said the Cat, safe to see
    Clever Fox hunted out of his wits.

    Trust To Skill Rather Than Wit
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Crane, titled "The Cat And The Fox", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
